commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `small` direct live-model profile for constrained Qwen/GLM model coverage, updates focused agent live-profile tests, wires live direct completions through the simple-completion transport prep path, and documents the new profile.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +96, Docs +7. Total +164 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer live-test profile addition, not a reported production bug. Source inspection shows current main lacks the named `small` profile, and the PR body records focused validation for the changed harness path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is already implemented and protected by maintainer/draft handling, so the next action is maintainer review or undraft/land rather than an automated repair.

target.title: test(agents): add small model live profile
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` for the direct live model matrix, covering constrained Qwen/GLM routes without expanding the modern profile.
- Reuses the curated-priority selection path for the small profile and documents the direct profile plus separate Ollama Cloud live smoke.
- Prepares live direct completions through the simple-completion transport hook so transport-aware models use the same setup path as runtime completions.

Refs https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/live-model-filter.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-transport.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-transport.test.ts` after final rebase
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `COREPACK_ENABLE_DOWNLOAD_PROMPT=0 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Ollama Cloud live smoke: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=glm-5.1:cloud OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS=0 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts`
- Crabbox AWS changed gate: `run_83fe159a34d9`, lease `cbx_c700d99e4cc8`, slug `pearl-krill`, `corepack pnpm check:changed`, exit 0
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Maintainers can run a named direct small-model live profile instead of maintaining one-off comma lists for constrained Qwen/GLM coverage.
Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest/docs/lint, live Ollama Cloud API with `glm-5.1:cloud`, and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Commands listed in Verification.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed, Ollama Cloud live smoke passed with 2 tests passed and 2 skipped, Crabbox `run_83fe159a34d9` exited 0, autoreview clean.
Observed result after fix: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` is parsed as a curated direct profile and selected with small-profile priority/capping; Ollama Cloud remains covered by the dedicated provider live smoke.
What was not tested: Direct `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS=small` against OpenRouter/Z.AI/Qwen API keys, because this environment only had `OLLAMA_API_KEY` available.
target.author: vincentkoc
